cards.name: Ace of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: new opportunities, resources, abundance, prosperity, security, stability, manifestation

cards.name: 8 of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: skill, talent, craftsmanship, quality, high standards, expertise, mastery, commitment, dedication, accomplishment

cards.name: ⅩⅦ The Star, reversed
cards.interpretation: hopelessness, despair, negativity, lack of faith, despondent
